content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.opencode_worker
FILE: cosmos/integration/opencode_worker.py (249 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: OpenCode Worker Integration
Spawns OpenCode CLI instances to work on development tasks
https://opencode.ai - Open source AI coding agent

CLASSES:
- OpenCodeWorker: Wrapper for OpenCode CLI to work on development tasks.
OpenCode is an open-sourc
  Methods: async def is_installed(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def install(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def execute_task(self, task_description: str, task_id: str, files: list=None) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: async def run_build_agent(self, task: str) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: async def run_plan_agent(self, task: str) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: def get_status(self) -> Dict[str, Any]

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_opencode_worker() -> OpenCodeWorker
- async def spawn_opencode_task(task_desc: str, task_id: str) -> Optional[str]
